events.agenda: 6:00 PM Check-in/Registration; 6:30 PM Welcome Remarks & Housekeeping by taod; 7:00 PM "What's new at dbt Labs"; 7:15 PM Lessons on migrating legacy stack to dbt; 7:45 PM Pairing dbt and Slack Bots; 8:15 PM Networking & Reception.
events.event_description: dbt Meetups are networking events open to all folks working with data! Talks predominantly focus on community members' experience with dbt, however, you'll catch presentations on broader topics such as analytics engineering, data stacks, data ops, modeling, testing, and team structures.
events.location: taod Consulting GmbH, Oskar-Jäger-Str. 173, K4, Cologne
events.raw_text: Thu, May 15, 2025 · 6:00 PM to 9:00 PM CEST. 7:00 PM: Stephan Durry (dbt Labs) - "What's new at dbt Labs". 7:15 PM: Sönke Maibach (taod) - "Lessons on migrating legacy stack to dbt reliably and cheaply". 7:45 PM: Alex Rupp (Schüttflix) - "Pairing dbt and Slack Bots - for data-driven communication".
